CodeGeneration.title: Reference-data code-generation.
CodeGeneration.description: This configuration is used for generating reference-data related code. This is a well understood, deterministic pattern, that is best suited for scenarios where reference-data capabilities are required in a consistent manner.

domain.title: The domain name.
domain.description: This is the .NET domain name. Attempts to default from the underlying data project file path; uses the second to last segment of the child-most sub-directory by convention. For example, `/xxx/yyy/My.App.Sales.CodeGen`, the domain would be `Sales`.

idType.title: The default reference data identifier type.

collectionSortOrder.title: The default reference data collection sort order.
collectionSortOrder.description: This is the default collection sort order. Defaults to `Code`.

routeConvention.title: The route naming convention where not directly specified.

entityFrameworkRepositoryName.title: The default Entity Framework (EF) repository parameter name.
entityFrameworkRepositoryName.description: This is the .NET Entity Framework (EF) repository parameter name that should be used within the generated code. Defaults to `ef`.

contractsProjectPath.title: The relative path for the .NET contracts-related project.

apiProjectPath.title: The relative path for the .NET API-related project.

applicationProjectPath.title: The relative path for the .NET application-related project.

dataProjectPath.title: The relative path for the .NET data-related project.
dataProjectPath.description: Defaults to automatic inference using expected name of `Infrastructure`.

dataRepositoriesPath.title: The path to append to the `{DotNetDataProjectPath}` for the .NET generated repository code.

dataModelsPath.title: The path to append to the `{DotNetDataProjectPath}` for the .NET generated models code.

dataMappingPath.title: The path to append to the `{DotNetDataProjectPath}` for the .NET generated mapping code.

plural.title: The pluralized reference-data entity (contract) name.
plural.description: Defaults to `{Name}` with the last word pluralized.

text.title: The reference-data entity friendly text.
text.description: Defaults to `{Name}` converted to sentence case. This is primarily used in generated code comments.

collectionSortOrder.title: The collection sort order.
collectionSortOrder.description: This is the collection sort order. Defaults to root `{CollectionSortOrder}`.

repositoryName.title: The repository parameter name.
repositoryName.description: This is the .NET repository parameter name that should be used within the generated code. Defaults from root `{Repository}` and related configuration.

mapper.title: The mapper name.
mapper.description: This is the .NET mapper name used within the generated code. Defaults to root `{Name}Mapper`.

excludeMapper.title: Indicates whether to exclude the generation of the mapper.

type.title: The property type.
type.description: Defaults to `string?`. Supports the following conventions: `^`-prefix for reference-data and `?`-suffix for nullable.

text.title: The property text.
text.description: Defaults to `{Name}` converted to sentence case. This is primarily used in generated code comments.

model.title: The corresponding data model property name.

excludeContract.title: Indicates whether to exclude the property from the generated contract code.

excludeMapping.title: Indicates whether to exclude the property from the generated mapping code.
